name: golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev
title: golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev
summary: API to track the lifecyle of Golang goroutines, and provide clean termination
description:
API to track the lifecyle of Golang goroutines, and provide clean termination
Conventional API for clean goroutine termination. A Tomb tracks the
lifecycle of a goroutine as alive, dying or dead, and the reason for
its death.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev because API to track the lifecyle of Golang goroutines, and provide clean termination.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gopkg-tomb.v1-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
